defs: One who makes, forms, or molds; a manufacturer; specifically, the Creator.
quotes: The universal Maker we may praise.

defs: The person who makes a promissory note.
One who writes verses; a poet.
notes: ☞ “The Greeks named the poet poihth`s, which name, as the most excellent, hath gone through other languages. It cometh of this word poiei^n, make; wherein, I know not whether by luck or wisdom, we Englishmen have met well the Greeks in calling him a maker.”
